Battlefield Guide:
The battlefield behind me is related to Demonic Sword Zariche and Blood Sword Akamanah.
Every Monday thru Thursday between 18:00-23:59, a huge battle for the ownership of the Cursed Sword is held. A big reward is given to the person that possesses the Cursed Sword at the end of the battle, at 23:59.
Strategy, tactics, and power! Do you want to give it a try with everything you've got? I guarantee you won't regret it.
